Environmental Protection.summary: King has consistently supported environmental protection measures including clean energy legislation and climate action.
voted_for: Inflation Reduction Act including climate provisions (Senate Roll Call, August 2022)
Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act with environmental provisions (Senate Roll Call, August 2021)

Criminal Justice Reform.summary: King has supported bipartisan criminal justice reform efforts including sentencing reform.
voted_for: First Step Act (Senate Roll Call, December 2018)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: King has voted to protect reproductive rights and access to abortion services.
voted_for: Women's Health Protection Act (Senate Roll Call, February 2022)
Codifying Roe v. Wade legislation (Senate Roll Call, May 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: King has consistently supported LGBTQ+ rights legislation including marriage equality.
voted_for: Respect for Marriage Act (Senate Roll Call, November 2022)

Environmental Protection.summary: Collins has supported some environmental measures while opposing others, taking a moderate approach on climate policy.
voted_for: Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act with environmental provisions (Senate Roll Call, August 2021)
voted_against: Inflation Reduction Act climate provisions (Senate Roll Call, August 2022)

Criminal Justice Reform.summary: Collins supported the First Step Act and other bipartisan criminal justice reform measures.
voted_for: First Step Act (Senate Roll Call, December 2018)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Collins identifies as pro-choice but has opposed some Democratic abortion rights legislation while supporting others.
voted_against: Women's Health Protection Act (Senate Roll Call, February 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Collins has supported LGBTQ+ rights including marriage equality legislation.
voted_for: Respect for Marriage Act (Senate Roll Call, November 2022)

Environmental Protection.summary: Golden has taken moderate positions on environmental issues, supporting some climate measures while opposing others.
voted_for: Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act (House Roll Call, November 2021)
voted_against: Build Back Better Act climate provisions (House Roll Call, November 2021)

Criminal Justice Reform.summary: Golden has supported criminal justice reform measures including the First Step Act.
voted_for: First Step Act (House Roll Call, December 2018)

Progressive Taxation.summary: Golden has opposed some progressive tax increases while supporting others, taking a moderate approach.
voted_against: Build Back Better Act tax provisions (House Roll Call, November 2021)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Golden has voted to protect reproductive rights and access to abortion services.
voted_for: Women's Health Protection Act (House Roll Call, September 2021)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Golden has supported LGBTQ+ rights legislation including marriage equality.
voted_for: Respect for Marriage Act (House Roll Call, December 2022)

Environmental Protection.summary: Pingree has been a strong advocate for environmental protection and climate action throughout her tenure.
voted_for: Inflation Reduction Act (House Roll Call, August 2022)
Build Back Better Act (House Roll Call, November 2021)
Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act (House Roll Call, November 2021)

Police Accountability.summary: Pingree has supported police accountability measures including the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act.
voted_for: George Floyd Justice in Policing Act (House Roll Call, March 2021)

Criminal Justice Reform.summary: Pingree has consistently supported criminal justice reform legislation.
voted_for: First Step Act (House Roll Call, December 2018)

Progressive Taxation.summary: Pingree has supported progressive tax reforms including higher taxes on wealthy individuals and corporations.
voted_for: Build Back Better Act tax provisions (House Roll Call, November 2021)
Inflation Reduction Act corporate minimum tax (House Roll Call, August 2022)

Fresh Food Access.summary: Pingree has championed food access issues as a member of the Appropriations Committee and former farmer.
voted_for: Farm Bill with SNAP provisions (House Roll Call, June 2018)
Local Food Purchase Assistance program funding (Appropriations, 2021)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Pingree has been a strong supporter of reproductive rights throughout her congressional career.
voted_for: Women's Health Protection Act (House Roll Call, September 2021)
Ensuring Access to Abortion Act (House Roll Call, July 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Pingree has consistently supported LGBTQ+ rights legislation including marriage equality and anti-discrimination measures.
voted_for: Respect for Marriage Act (House Roll Call, December 2022)
Equality Act (House Roll Call, February 2021)

Public School Funding.summary: Pingree has supported increased federal funding for public education.
voted_for: American Rescue Plan education funding (House Roll Call, March 2021)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Simmons has opposed abortion rights legislation in the Maine Legislature.

Environmental Protection.summary: Hepler has supported environmental protection measures in the Maine Legislature.

Cannabis Policy.summary: Arata has taken varied positions on cannabis regulation in Maine.
